column3: ...That was a sigh just now. At least look a little worried about me.
The new TV show wasn't that great. I just felt tired after watching it.
The main character is a young doctor. He rides helicopters to help people injured in the field.
Wherever he goes, something always comes up, forcing him to make a hard decision...
He always makes this serious look that the audience eats right up. Everyone's watching weekly.
I can see why everyone gets emotional, but that's all I get out of it.
I think I prefer calmer music and books.
Yes, I might play a Rachmaninoff concerto in the background while reading a lovely story.
Yes. I have many books, but I'll read anything if it interests me.
I read cell phone novels too...but they're not exactly my cup of tea.
One-sided love stories, being dumped... They're all like that, and it just doesn't click for me.
I prefer things less realistic, like fantasy that isn't based on science.
This world isn't simple enough to be explained by science.
I mean, look at you. You're tiny now.
If this were a fantasy world, would I be the villain?
...Teehee. I really look it, don't I?
Well, I've no intention of saving the world at all.
Though I'm a bit intrigued by the idea of destroying it...
Me, wrecking the world like in a monster movie.
Really? I'll keep that in mind.
Whatever happens next will all be your fault... Just kidding.
Well, if I ever head down that path, come as a hero of justice.
Hopefully you'll be able to win as easily as they do in the children's movies.
Now I want to watch something. Where's the DVD...?
Join me by the TV for a change.
Let's leave it at that for today, Rin.
